Lastly, to my 10 degenerate followers, thanks for supporting me! Making bots piqued my delusional side and it help me to express stories or ideas I have in mind. Knowing that few people appreciate shits that I did here make me feel so (⁠✿⁠^⁠‿⁠^⁠)~~

I hope y'all doing fine, happy, and healthy
